name: Coverdell ESA Tax-Free Growth

eligibility.description: Contributors must meet income phase-out requirements (MAGI below $110k single/$220k joint); annual contribution limit of $2,000.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Earnings in a Coverdell Education Savings Account grow tax-free and distributions are tax-exempt for qualified K-12 or higher education expenses.
